Home › Categories › Hotels with Shuttle
→ from €100/night

Hotels with Shuttle in Berlin

Transfers to/from BER, trade fair or stations — ideal for late-night arrivals.

Many hotels — especially business and mid-range houses — offer a shuttle service to BER, the trade fair grounds or Hauptbahnhof. Particularly useful for early arrivals or late departures.

Where to find them

Best districts for shuttle hotels

H.Helmlechner · CC BY-SA 4.0
Centre 11 hotels

Mitte

Stately, history-rich, urban-elegant. Tourists by day, theatre and fine dining by night.

Brandenburg Gate Museum Island Reichstag
Fridolin freudenfett · CC BY-SA 3.0
West 9 hotels

Charlottenburg-Wilmersdorf

Elegant, refined, calm. Shopping on Ku'damm, coffee at Savignyplatz, classical concerts at the Philharmonie.

Kurfürstendamm Charlottenburg Palace KaDeWe
UnknownUnknown · CC BY-SA 3.0 de
East 1 hotels

Treptow-Köpenick

Water, woods, recovery. Boat tours, lake lidos, boat rentals, Spreepark memories.

Müggelsee Köpenick Palace Treptower Park

Discover other hotel styles

✦

Luxury Hotels

5-star, concierge service, spa, Michelin restaurant. Especially in Mitte and Charlottenburg.

from €280/night hotels
◆

Boutique Hotels

Small, individual, design-driven. Berlin has one of Europe's densest boutique hotel scenes.

from €140/night hotels
♥

Family Hotels

Children's beds, family rooms, pool, garden. Pankow and Reinickendorf lead.

from €110/night hotels
